category_sources: source_facts.description says Commodore BASIC V2 as a scripting language; official GitHub README describes cbmbasic as Commodore BASIC V2 usable interactively or as a scripting language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cbmbasic; official GitHub repository title and README use cbmbasic.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface; repository also includes ANSI_Extension.md.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project and source_facts.repo is empty, so the homepage is the official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Commodore BASIC V2 and scripting language; source_facts.executables lists cbmbasic CLI; official README describes Commodore 64 BASIC compatibility and interactive/script usage.
